# Meal Ticket

## Observed Text

- Whenever you enter a shop room, heal 15 HP.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strongest when picked before known shops or with Courier routes; late Act 3 copies can whiff if no shop remains, so value it by remaining map access.
